potential_missing.source_sentence: Either a sample is needed, or the available stock is checked.

potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall allow customers to create an account by filling in required details.
The system shall conduct a defect check on the produced garments.
The system shall deliver the finished garments to the customer if all checks pass.
The system shall generate a report along with feedback at the end of the process.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: Once the registration is complete, they can place an order for garments.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow customers to place orders for garments once their account creation and registration are complete.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: After placing the order, there are two possibilities. Either a sample is needed, or the available stock is checked.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall handle two scenarios after an order is placed: either sending out sample materials if required, or checking the availability of raw materials.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: If the materials are not available, they are purchased. If the materials are already available, they are processed.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall purchase raw materials if they are not available and process them if they are already available after stock checking.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall send out sample materials if a customer needs them after placing an order.
hallucinations.reason: The source text mentions that this happens only if a sample is required, not necessarily after every order.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall process raw materials if they are already available.
hallucinations.reason: The source text does not explicitly state that the system should process raw materials; it only states that they will be used for production once ready.

duplicates.requirement_a: The system shall begin garment production once raw materials are ready, either through purchasing or processing.
duplicates.requirement_b: The system shall conduct a defect check on the produced garments.
duplicates.reason: These requirements do not seem to be duplicates but should be reviewed for clarity.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall send out sample materials if a customer needs them after placing an order.
ambiguities.reason: It is unclear from the source text whether 'if a customer needs them' applies to all orders or just specific ones.

prompt:
You are a strict requirements validator.
Compare rewritten requirements against the source text.

Return ONLY valid JSON with this schema:
{
  "missing_requirements": [
    {
      "evidence_quote": "string",
      "suggested_requirement": "The system shall ..."
    }
  ],
  "hallucinations": [
    {
      "rewritten_requirement": "string",
      "reason": "string"
    }
  ],
  "duplicates": [
    {
      "requirement_a": "string",
      "requirement_b": "string",
      "reason": "string"
    }
  ],
  "ambiguities": [
    {
      "rewritten_requirement": "string",
      "reason": "string"
    }
  ],
  "overall_assessment": "pass|needs_review"
}

Source text:
<<<
A customer starts by creating an account by filling in the required details. Once the registration is complete, they can place an order for garments.

After placing the order, there are two possibilities. Either a sample is needed, or the available stock is checked.

If a sample is required, sample materials are sent out. After that, the process continues.

If stock is checked, the availability of raw materials is reviewed. Based on that, if the materials are not available, they are purchased. If the materials are already available, they are processed.

Once the raw materials are ready, either through purchasing or processing, garment production begins.

After the garments are produced, they are checked for any defects. Once everything is cleared, the finished garments are delivered to the customer.

After delivery, billing is completed, and the payment is made.

Finally, a report is generated along with feedback, and the process comes to an end.
>>>

Rewritten requirements JSON:
{
  "rewritten_requirements": [
    "The system shall allow customers to create an account by filling in required details.",
    "The system shall enable customers to place orders for garments once they are registered.",
    "The system shall send out sample materials if a customer needs them after placing an order.",
    "The system shall review the availability of raw materials for orders that require stock checking.",
    "The system shall purchase raw materials if they are not available after stock checking.",
    "The system shall process raw materials if they are already available.",
    "The system shall begin garment production once raw materials are ready, either through purchasing or processing.",
    "The system shall conduct a defect check on the produced garments.",
    "The system shall deliver the finished garments to the customer if all checks pass.",
    "The system shall complete billing and payment processes after delivering the garments.",
    "The system shall generate a report along with feedback at the end of the process."
  ]
}
final_assessment_policy: moderate: needs_review if extraction/rewriting failed, no rewritten requirements were produced, exact duplicate rewritten requirements were detected, or the LLM validator reports 6 or more total issues across missing requirements, hallucinations, duplicates, and ambiguities
